zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Breightmet於大約1180年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Augustine de Breightmet27歲，母親Edith de Barton20歲。她和William de Notton Lord of Breightmet至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1222年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Breightmet于大约1180年出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Augustine de Breightmet27岁，母亲Edith de Barton20岁。她和William de Notton Lord of Breightmet至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1222年之后在英国英格兰越可爾諾頓。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Breightmet was born about 1180, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Augustine de Breightmet, was 27 and her mother, Edith de Barton, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with William de Notton Lord of Breightmet. She died after 1222, in Notton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Breightmet est née environ 1180, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Augustine de Breightmet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Edith de Barton, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec William de Notton Lord of Breightmet. Elle est décédée après 1222, à Notton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Breightmet um 1180 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Augustine de Breightmet 27 und ihre Mutter Edith de Barton 20. Sie hatte mit William de Notton Lord of Breightmet mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1222 in Notton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Breightmetが約1180年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Augustine de Breightmetは27歳，母Edith de Bartonは20歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Notton Lord of Breightmetとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1222年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノットオンで死去した。

ko.Barton, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 바턴 인 테 브이스
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Breightmet(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Augustine de Breightmet(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edith de Barton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 William de Notton Lord of Breightmet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Breightmet родилась около 1180 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Augustine de Breightmet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith de Barton, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от William de Notton Lord of Breightmet. Она умерла после 1222 г. в местности ноттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
